allow: PowerShell($WshShell = New-Object -ComObject WScript.Shell; $Shortcut = $WshShell.CreateShortcut\("D:\\documents\\source\\repos\\LeadTurbo\\Open Terminal.lnk"\); $Shortcut.TargetPath = "powershell.exe"; $Shortcut.Arguments = "-NoExit -Command ""Set-Location -Path '$PWD'"""; $Shortcut.WorkingDirectory = "D:\\documents\\source\\repos\\LeadTurbo"; $Shortcut.IconLocation = "powershell.exe,0"; $Shortcut.Description = "Open PowerShell in LeadTurbo directory"; $Shortcut.Save\(\); Write-Output "Shortcut created: $\($Shortcut.FullName\)")
